items.title: Project takeover shows four workspace tabs (FILES · REPO · PRS · TERMINAL)
items.expected: Four tabs render; FILES is active by default.
items.evidence: Verified by the user in the running app (session screenshots show FILES · REPO · PRS · TERMINAL).

items.title: FILES tab behaves exactly as before
items.expected: Tree, open tabs, dirty markers, save, and editor state work; tab switches don't reset open editors.
items.evidence: FILES extracted unchanged; exercised in-app during the session; tsc + build clean.

items.title: PRS tab is project-scoped (Azure panels relocated, no selector)
items.expected: PRS shows the open project's Azure connection + PRs; no project selector.
items.evidence: Relocation verified in-app (PRS tab present and scoped to the open project).

items.title: Cockpit removed from the sidebar; no dead imports
items.expected: No Cockpit entry; CockpitPanel.tsx and GitPanel.tsx deleted.
items.evidence: App.tsx SECTIONS has no cockpit; CockpitPanel.tsx + GitPanel.tsx removed; build clean.

items.title: Build + typecheck pass
items.evidence: Frontend tsc EXIT=0; Vite build succeeded.
